Authors and Citation

Authors

  • Zhengjia Wang. Copyright holder, author, maintainer.

    AdminLTE - Bootstrap 4 Admin Dashboard

  • Bootstrap contributors. Contributor.

    Bootstrap library

  • Ivan Sagalaev. Contributor, copyright holder.
    highlight.js library

  • Rene Haas. Contributor, copyright holder.
    OverlayScrollbars library

  • Zeno Rocha. Contributor, copyright holder.
    Clipboard.js library

Citation

Source: DESCRIPTION
